content:
# Mineral Dissolution

**Summary**: The process by which minerals dissolve into an aqueous solution.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-alghawi|Alghawi, 2025]] evaluated the mineral dissolution of Ca, Mg, and Fe in different water types.

## Scientific Context

- [[2025-alghawi|Alghawi, 2025]] Key to understanding how basalt can trap CO2 by forming carbonates.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2025-alghawi|Alghawi, 2025]] Measured as concentration of Ca, Mg, and Fe in ppm.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Iron dissolution increased significantly (685%) when pH was lowered from 7.7 to 3. ([[2025-alghawi|Alghawi, 2025, p. 58]])
